items.name_en: 【Exclusive Photo M48865 Cream White & Blue Enamel Mini】This Capucines Mini bag features soft, muted tones that make the classic silhouette stand out. Exquisite chains link metal Monogram flowers, each cast, enameled, and hand-polished to shine with brilliant luster. The flap can be worn on the outside or tucked inside to reveal the LV logo. size:21x14x8cm

items.name_en: 【Exclusive Real Shot M13656 Cream Embossing】 This season's Nano Noé backpack features an exquisite two-tone design, suitable for both day and night looks. Crafted in leather with a gold chain strap, the lighter Monogram embossed pattern is accented with contrasting borders. The interior offers ample space for daily essentials like a phone, small wallet, and lipstick. 19 x 15 x 10 cm (Length x Height x Width)

The interior offers ample space for daily essentials like a phone, small wallet, and lipstick. 19 x 15 x 10 cm (Length x Height x Width)

items.name_en: 【Exclusive Real Shot M14017 Monogram】 The Louis Vuitton Noé Cargo bucket bag is constructed with Monogram canvas and features vintage leather trim, inheriting the Noé bucket bag designed in 1932 to carry champagne bottles. The wide front pocket and exquisite details pay homage to Louis Vuitton's long history while meeting modern needs. The top handle and shoulder strap are both detachable for flexible portability. 24 x 16 x 22 cm (Height x Width x Length)
items.name_cn: 【Exclusive Real Shot M14017 Monogram】 The Louis Vuitton Noé Cargo bucket bag is constructed with Monogram canvas and features vintage leather trim, inheriting the Noé bucket bag designed in 1932 to carry champagne bottles. The wide front pocket and exquisite details pay homage to Louis Vuitton's long history while meeting modern needs. The top handle and shoulder strap are both detachable for flexible portability. 24 x 16 x 22 cm (Height x Width x Length)

items.name_en: 【Exclusive Real Shot M45653 Cream Print 】M14403 This OnTheGo small handbag renews the brand's classic Monogram Empreinte leather, outlining the pattern in matching tones. Detachable metal chain accents add a touch of detail, while striped fabric lining exudes elegance, and a detachable shoulder strap allows for shoulder or crossbody carrying. 19 x 11.5 x 25 cm (H x W x L)

items.name_en: 【Exclusive Real Shot M64064 Cream Print 】M14968 Pochette Félicie chain bag is crafted from Monogram Empreinte leather, subtly embossing the classic Louis Vuitton Monogram pattern.
